info.name: Deck Recurrence
info.description:
Create Deck cards on a schedule. Define a template card and a recurrence rule (daily, weekly, monthly or any RFC 5545 RRULE) and Deck Recurrence will clone the template into the stack of your choice when each occurrence is due. The spawned card's due date is configurable: at the occurrence time, a delay after it (for example one week later), or none at all. Labels, assignees and the description are carried over from the template.
Auto-archive rules keep boards tidy: archive done cards automatically once they have been done for a while (for example five days), or once they reach a certain age — per board or per stack.
Requires the Deck app to be installed and enabled.
info.author: Fatih AKTAS
